extDesc.message: Read the current page with an LLM and post high-quality annotations to Hypothesis in one click. BYO key, client-side, open source.

status_need_bigmodel.message: Please configure your BigModel API key in Settings.

status_need_token.message: Please configure your Hypothesis Token in Settings.

status_need_token_publish.message: Please configure your Hypothesis Token first.

status_short_content.message: Page text is too short or unreadable.

ann_quote_missing.message: Quote not found in page text — skipped.

options_hint_bigmodel.message: Get one at $URL$. Uses the glm-4-plus model by default.

options_hint_style.message: Preset key (non-consensus / data / actionable / gold-sentences / critique / surprise) or any custom description. Leave empty to use the mode default.

warn_missing_both.message: Missing Hypothesis Token and BigModel API Key — open Settings to add them.

warn_missing_token.message: Hypothesis Token not set — open Settings.

warn_missing_key.message: BigModel API Key not set — open Settings.

error_not_scriptable.message: This page type can't be read by extensions (chrome://, file://, Chrome Web Store, extension pages, etc.). Open a regular https:// page and try again.

error_network.message: Network error — check your internet connection, VPN, or firewall.

error_cors.message: Request blocked — if you're behind a proxy or VPN, try switching it off.

error_http_401.message: $CTX$ rejected the API key (HTTP 401). Check the key in Settings.

error_http_403.message: $CTX$ access denied (HTTP 403). Key may lack permission or quota is exhausted.

error_http_429.message: $CTX$ rate limit hit (HTTP 429). Wait a moment and retry.

error_llm_empty.message: BigModel returned an empty response — try again or change the style prompt.

error_llm_no_json.message: BigModel didn't return valid JSON — try again. If it keeps failing, make the custom style shorter.

error_llm_json_parse.message: BigModel output couldn't be parsed as JSON ($DETAIL$) — try again.
